#dir-rows{display:grid;gap:10px;align-content:start;}
.dir-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(10,15,26,.78);}
.dir-priority{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:var(--yellow);}
.dir-text{flex:1;color:var(--text);}
.dir-revoke{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(255,95,122,.35);color:var(--red);padding:.5rem .7rem;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;}
.task-row{padding:14px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(10,15,26,.8);margin-bottom:12px;transition:.15s ease;}
.task-row:hover{border-color:rgba(72,199,255,.3);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.task-row.running{border-left:4px solid var(--yellow);}
.task-row.done{border-left:4px solid var(--green);}
.task-row.failed{border-left:4px solid var(--red);}
.task-row.evaluating{border-left:4px solid var(--purple);}
.task-row.followup{border-left:4px solid var(--orange);}
.task-row.queued,.task-row.cancelled{border-left:4px solid var(--dim);}
.task-header{display:grid;grid-template-columns:70px 90px minmax(0,1fr) 88px 52px 52px 58px;gap:10px;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;}
.task-id,.task-prov,.task-iter,.task-score,.task-dur{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.8rem;}
.task-type{color:var(--cyan);font-size:.88rem;}
.task-desc{overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:var(--text);}
.task-progress{height:8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(88,112,157,.18);overflow:hidden;margin-top:12px;}
.task-progress-fill{height:100%;border-radius:999px;}
.task-detail{display:none;margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(49,67,102,.35);}
.task-row.expanded .task-detail{display:block;}
 .detail-label{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:8px;}
.task-log{max-height:180px;overflow:auto;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:10px;background:#08101b;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.78rem;}
.task-log-entry{display:grid;grid-template-columns:68px 1fr;gap:8px;padding:.18rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(49,67,102,.2);}
.task-log-entry:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.tl-ts{color:var(--dim);}
.detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px;}
.detail-block{padding:12px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(8,12,20,.72);border:1px solid var(--line);}
.detail-block.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
.detail-value{color:var(--text);font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.5;}
.score-bars{display:grid;gap:8px;}
.score-bar{display:grid;grid-template-columns:72px 1fr 42px;gap:10px;align-items:center;}
.score-label{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;}
.score-track{height:8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(88,112,157,.18);overflow:hidden;}
.score-fill{height:100%;border-radius:999px;}
.score-val{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.78rem;text-align:right;}
.task-cancel-btn{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(255,95,122,.35);color:var(--red);padding:.55rem .75rem;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;}
.log-entry{display:grid;grid-template-columns:70px 110px 130px minmax(0,1fr);gap:10px;align-items:start;}
.log-ts,.log-typ,.log-caller{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);}
.log-msg{min-width:0;overflow-wrap:anywhere;}
.prov-card{padding:14px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(10,15,26,.78);display:grid;gap:8px;}
.prov-card.primary{outline:1px solid rgba(72,199,255,.35);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(72,199,255,.12) inset;}
.prov-card.unavail{opacity:.72;}
.prov-name{font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.prov-model,.prov-rate{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);overflow-wrap:anywhere;}
.badge.inf{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--cyan);border-color:rgba(72,199,255,.35);}
.directive-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto auto;gap:10px;align-items:center;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(10,15,26,.78);}
.dir-id{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.74rem;color:var(--dim);}

.chat{padding:14px;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto auto minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:12px;min-height:0;}
.chat-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
.chat-top h2{font-size:1rem;}
.chat-controls{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.control-chip{padding:.42rem .65rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--line2);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);background:rgba(12,18,32,.82);}
.toggle-card-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;}
.ctrl-card{padding:12px;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(10,15,26,.75);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
.ctrl-copy strong{display:block;font-size:.88rem;}
.ctrl-copy span{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);}
.switch{position:relative;width:48px;height:28px;display:inline-block;}
.switch input{opacity:0;width:0;height:0;}
.slider{position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:999px;background:#293750;border:1px solid var(--line2);transition:.2s ease;}
.slider:before{content:'';position:absolute;left:3px;top:3px;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:white;transition:.2s ease;}
.switch input:checked + .slider{background:rgba(51,229,154,.25);border-color:rgba(51,229,154,.45);}
.switch input:checked + .slider:before{transform:translateX(19px);background:var(--green);}
.switch input:disabled + .slider{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed;}
#chat-messages{overflow:auto;border:1px solid var(--line);background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(8,12,21,.84),rgba(7,10,18,.94));border-radius:18px;padding:14px;display:grid;gap:12px;align-content:start;}
.msg{max-width:92%;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:16px;line-height:1.55;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.22);}
.msg.user{justify-self:end;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(79,124,255,.26),rgba(51,82,180,.24));border:1px solid rgba(79,124,255,.35);}
.msg.system{justify-self:start;background:rgba(19,27,46,.88);border:1px solid var(--line);}
.label{font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;}
.typing-indicator{justify-self:start;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(19,27,46,.88);border:1px solid var(--line);}
.typing-indicator .dots{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.typing-indicator .dots span{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cyan);opacity:.35;animation:bounce 1.1s infinite;}
.typing-indicator .dots span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.15s;}
.typing-indicator .dots span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.3s;}
@keyframes bounce{0%,80%,100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:.35}40%{transform:translateY(-4px);opacity:1}}
.chat-input-area{display:grid;gap:10px;}
#chat-input{width:100%;min-height:118px;max-height:240px;resize:vertical;padding:14px 15px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid var(--line2);background:#09111e;color:var(--text);line-height:1.55;}
.chat-btns{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.chat-send{padding:.85rem 1.1rem;border:none;border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cyan),var(--blue));color:#07111b;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;min-width:140px;}
.chat-send:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;}
.helper{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);}
#ws-debug-box{position:static!important;margin-top:auto;width:100%!important;border-radius:12px!important;}
.flash-new{animation:flash .9s ease;}
@keyframes flash{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(72,199,255,0)}35%{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(72,199,255,.22)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(72,199,255,0)}}
@media (max-width: 1300px){.app{grid-template-columns:280px minmax(0,1fr);grid-template-rows:74px minmax(340px,.95fr) minmax(360px,1fr);}.chat.panel{grid-column:1/-1;}}
@media (max-width: 920px){body{overflow:auto;}.app{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:auto;min-height:100dvh;}.header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:20;}.sidebar{max-height:none;overflow:visible;}.hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.task-header{grid-template-columns:60px 78px minmax(0,1fr) 74px 44px 44px 50px;font-size:.78rem;}.toggle-card-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}#chat-input{min-height:96px;}}
@media (max-width: 640px){.app{padding:10px;gap:10px;}.header{padding:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}.brand{min-width:100%;}.header-actions{width:100%;justify-content:space-between;}.sidebar,.workspace,.chat{padding:12px;}.task-header{grid-template-columns:56px 70px minmax(0,1fr) 64px 40px 40px 44px;gap:6px;}.task-desc{font-size:.78rem;}.task-detail-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.directive-add-form{flex-direction:column;}.chat-btns{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;}.chat-send{width:100%;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
  <header class="header panel">
    <div class="brand">
      <div id="conn-dot" class="dot boot"></div>
      <div>
        <h1>Isaac Unified Environment</h1>
        <small>Mission Control · Live orchestration · local-first</small>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="status-strip">
      <span class="badge on" id="sys-status">ONLINE</span>
      <span id="conn-label">Verbinde…</span>
    </div>
    <div class="header-actions">
      <button class="hbtn" onclick="sendCommand('status')">Status</button>
      <button class="hbtn danger" id="pause-btn" onclick="togglePause()">Pause</button>
      <span class="clock" id="clock">--:--:--</span>
    </div>
  </header>

  <aside class="panel sidebar">
    <div class="section-title"><h2>System Monitor</h2><span class="badge">Live</span></div>
    <div class="stack">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="label">Executor</div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Tasks total</span><span class="mv" id="m-total">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Running</span><span class="mv y" id="m-running">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Queue</span><span class="mv" id="m-queue">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Avg. score</span><span class="mv" id="m-avgscore">–</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="label">Logic</div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Bewertet</span><span class="mv" id="l-evaluated">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Nachfragen</span><span class="mv" id="l-followups">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Switches</span><span class="mv" id="l-switches">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Zerlegungen</span><span class="mv" id="l-decomps">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Min-Score</span><span class="mv" id="l-minscore">–</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="label">Gedächtnis</div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Konversationen</span><span class="mv" id="mem-conv">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Fakten</span><span class="mv" id="mem-facts">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Task-Ergebnisse</span><span class="mv" id="mem-tasks">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Working Memory</span><span class="mv" id="mem-working">0</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="label">Audit</div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Log-Einträge</span><span class="mv" id="a-total">0</span></div>
        <div class="metric"><span>Datei-Größe</span><span class="mv" id="a-size">0 KB</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="section-title"><h2 style="margin:0">Aktive Direktiven</h2><span class="tab-badge">Live</span></div>
        <div id="sidebar-directives"><div class="dir-side-item" style="color:var(--muted)">Keine aktiven Direktiven</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card side-notes">
        <strong style="display:block;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:8px;">Unified Control</strong>
        WebSocket-gestützte Telemetrie, API-Status und Chat laufen im bestehenden Isaac-Stack — ohne zweiten Server.
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <section class="main">
    <div class="panel hero">
      <div class="hero-card">
        <h3>Isaac Mission Control</h3>
        <p>Das Dashboard kombiniert Status, Task-Übersicht, Provider-Monitoring und Direktiven-Verwaltung in einer Oberfläche. Das Design folgt dem Gemini-Blueprint, bleibt aber nativ auf deinem bestehenden <strong>aiohttp + WebSocket</strong>-Stack.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="bigstat"><div class="k">Verbindung</div><div class="v">Live via WS</div></div>
        <div class="bigstat"><div class="k">Task-Filter</div><div class="v" id="tm-count">0 Tasks</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="toolbar">
      <button class="tab active" onclick="showTab('taskmanager')">Task-Manager <span class="tab-badge">⏱</span></button>
      <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('log')">Audit-Log <span class="tab-badge" id="log-count-label">0</span></button>
      <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('providers')">Provider <span class="tab-badge">⚙</span></button>
      <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('directives')">Direktiven <span class="tab-badge" id="tab-dir">0</span></button>
      <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('tools')">Tools <span class="tab-badge" id="tab-tools">0</span></button>
      <button class="tab" onclick="showTab('updater')">Updater <span class="tab-badge" id="tab-updater">⇪</span></button>
    </div>

    <div class="panel workspace">
      <div class="tab-content active" id="tab-taskmanager">
        <div class="tm-header">
          <button class="tm-filter-btn active" data-filter="all" onclick="setFilter('all',this)">Alle</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-filter="running" onclick="setFilter('running',this)">Running</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-filter="done" onclick="setFilter('done',this)">Done</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-filter="failed" onclick="setFilter('failed',this)">Failed</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-filter="queued" onclick="setFilter('queued',this)">Queue</button>
        </div>
        <div id="tm-container"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tab-content" id="tab-log">
        <div class="tm-header">
          <button class="tm-filter-btn active" data-lfilter="all" onclick="setLogFilter('all',this)">Alle</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-lfilter="task" onclick="setLogFilter('task',this)">Tasks</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-lfilter="quality" onclick="setLogFilter('quality',this)">Quality</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-lfilter="error" onclick="setLogFilter('error',this)">Fehler</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-lfilter="steffen_input" onclick="setLogFilter('steffen_input',this)">Steffen</button>
          <button class="tm-filter-btn" data-lfilter="isaac_output" onclick="setLogFilter('isaac_output',this)">Isaac</button>
        </div>
        <div id="log-container"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tab-content" id="tab-providers">
        <div id="providers-grid"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="tab-content" id="tab-directives">
        <div id="directives-list">
          <div class="directive-add-form">
            <input id="dir-input" type="text" placeholder="Neue Direktive: z.B. Antworte immer auf Deutsch">
            <button class="hbtn" onclick="addDirective()">+ Direktive setzen</button>
          </div>
          <div id="dir-rows"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tab-content" id="tab-tools">
        <div class="tool-section">
          <div class="section-title"><h2>Tools</h2><span class="tab-badge" id="tools-live-count">0</span></div>
          <div class="tool-grid">
            <div class="tool-card">
              <h3>Verfügbare Tools · Live</h3>
              <div class="helper">Aktive Registry, HTTP-Schnittstellen und MCP-nahe Fähigkeiten.</div>
              <div id="tools-live-list" class="tool-list"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-card">
              <h3>Verfügbare Tools · Local</h3>
              <div class="helper">Lokal installierbare Schnittstellen für leichte Isaac-Erweiterungen.</div>
              <div id="tools-local-list" class="tool-list"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tool-card">
            <h3>Local installieren</h3>
            <div class="helper">Installiert Katalogeinträge in Isaacs Tool-Registry. Größen sind Richtwerte.</div>
            <div id="tools-install-list" class="tool-grid"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tab-content" id="tab-updater">
        <div class="tool-section">
          <div class="section-title"><h2>Updater</h2><span class="tab-badge" id="updater-package-count">0</span></div>
          <div class="tool-grid">
            <div class="tool-card">
              <h3>Paketquellen</h3>
              <div class="helper">ZIP-Dateien aus dem Download-Ordner. Isaac kann prüfen, patchen und rollbacken.</div>
              <div class="tool-actions" style="margin:.6rem 0 1rem 0">
                <button class="hbtn" onclick="refreshUpdater()">Neu laden</button>
                <button class="hbtn" onclick="rollbackUpdater()">Rollback</button>
              </div>
              <div id="updater-package-list" class="tool-list"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="tool-card">
              <h3>Prüfung / Status</h3>
              <div class="helper">Vor dem Patchen prüft Isaac Paketstruktur, Zielpfad und Compile-Test.</div>
              <div id="updater-status" class="tool-list"></div>
              <div id="updater-inspect" class="tool-list" style="margin-top:1rem"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <aside class="panel chat">
    <div class="chat-top">
      <div>
        <h2>Steffen ↔ Isaac</h2>
        <div class="helper">Live-Chat über denselben WebSocket wie Telemetrie und Task-Events</div>
      </div>
      <div class="chat-controls">
        <span class="control-chip">WS</span>
        <span class="control-chip" id="chat-status">offline</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="toggle-card-grid">
      <div class="ctrl-card">
        <div class="ctrl-copy"><strong>Orchestrierung</strong><span>Pause/Resume ist live angebunden.</span></div>
        <label class="switch"><input type="checkbox" id="orchestrator-toggle"><span class="slider"></span></label>
      </div>
      <div class="ctrl-card">
        <div class="ctrl-copy"><strong>Future Controls</strong><span>Playwright / Tools / RWX folgen im Backend.</span></div>
        <label class="switch"><input type="checkbox" disabled><span class="slider"></span></label>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="chat-messages"></div>

    <div class="chat-input-area">
      <textarea id="chat-input" placeholder="Nachricht an Isaac… (Strg+Enter = senden)" disabled></textarea>
      <div class="chat-btns">
        <div class="helper">Tipp: <strong>Status</strong>, <strong>ki status</strong>, <strong>pause</strong>, <strong>resume</strong></div>
        <button class="chat-send" id="chat-send-btn" onclick="sendChat()" disabled>Nachricht senden</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>
</div>
<script>

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const state = {
  tasks:    {},    // id → task
  logs:     [],
  ws:       null,
  paused:   false,
  filter:   'all',
  lfilter:  'all',
  online:   false,
  tools:    [],
  toolCatalog: [],
  liveTools: null,
  updater: { packages: [], status: null, inspect: null, selected: null },
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WEBSOCKET
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const DEFAULT_WS_PORT = 8765;
const WS_PROTO = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
const WS_DEBUG_BOX_ID = 'ws-debug-box';
const WS_HOST = '127.0.0.1';
let WS_HOST_OVERRIDE = null;
let wsReconnectTimer = null;
let wsTriedTargets = [];

function ensureWsDebugBox() {
  let el = document.getElementById(WS_DEBUG_BOX_ID);
  if (!el) {
    el = document.createElement('div');
    el.id = WS_DEBUG_BOX_ID;
    el.style.position = 'fixed';
    el.style.right = '10px';
    el.style.bottom = '10px';
    el.style.zIndex = '99999';
    el.style.padding = '8px 10px';
    el.style.borderRadius = '10px';
    el.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.85)';
    el.style.color = '#fff';
    el.style.fontSize = '12px';
    el.style.fontFamily = 'monospace';
    el.style.maxWidth = '85vw';
    el.style.wordBreak = 'break-word';
    document.body.appendChild(el);
  }
  return el;
}

function setWsDebugStatus(text) {
  const el = ensureWsDebugBox();
  el.textContent = text;
}

async function getWsTargets() {
  const ports = [];
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/monitor_config', { cache: 'no-store' });
    if (res.ok) {
      const cfg = await res.json();
      if (cfg.ws_host) WS_HOST_OVERRIDE = cfg.ws_host;
      if (cfg.ws_port) ports.push(cfg.ws_port);
      if (Array.isArray(cfg.ws_port_candidates)) ports.push(...cfg.ws_port_candidates);
    }
  } catch (_) {}

  ports.push(DEFAULT_WS_PORT);
  for (let p = DEFAULT_WS_PORT; p < DEFAULT_WS_PORT + 10; p++) ports.push(p);

  const uniquePorts = [...new Set(ports.filter(Boolean))];
  const host = WS_HOST_OVERRIDE || WS_HOST;
  return uniquePorts.map((port) => ({ host, port }));
}

function scheduleReconnect() {
  if (wsReconnectTimer) return;
  wsReconnectTimer = setTimeout(() => {
    wsReconnectTimer = null;
    connect();
  }, 3000);
}

async function connect() {
  const targets = await getWsTargets();
  wsTriedTargets = targets;

  for (const target of targets) {
    const url = `${WS_PROTO}://${target.host}:${target.port}`;
    setWsDebugStatus(`WS connecting: ${url}`);

    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket(url);
      const opened = await new Promise((resolve) => {
        let settled = false;
        const finish = (ok) => {
          if (settled) return;
          settled = true;
          resolve(ok);
        };
        const timer = setTimeout(() => finish(false), 1500);
        ws.addEventListener('open', () => {
          clearTimeout(timer);
          finish(true);
        }, { once: true });
        ws.addEventListener('error', () => {
          clearTimeout(timer);
          finish(false);
        }, { once: true });
        ws.addEventListener('close', () => {
          clearTimeout(timer);
          finish(false);
        }, { once: true });
      });

      if (!opened) {
        try { ws.close(); } catch (_) {}
        continue;
      }

      state.ws = ws;
      state.ws.onopen = () => {
        setOnline(true);
        addSysMsg(`Verbunden mit Isaac (${url}).`);
        setWsDebugStatus(`WS open: ${url}`);
      };
      state.ws.onmessage = (e) => {
        try { handle(JSON.parse(e.data)); } catch(ex) { console.error(ex); }
      };
      state.ws.onclose = (ev) => {
        if (!state.ws || state.ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) setOnline(false);
        addSysMsg('Verbindung unterbrochen...');
        setWsDebugStatus(`WS close: code=${ev.code} reason=${ev.reason || '-'} target=${url}`);
        scheduleReconnect();
      };
      state.ws.onerror = () => {
        setWsDebugStatus(`WS error: target=${url}`);
        try { state.ws.close(); } catch (_) {}
      };

      setOnline(true);
      setWsDebugStatus(`WS open: ${url}`);
      return;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('WS connect error', err);
    }
  }

  setOnline(false);
  setWsDebugStatus(`WS failed: ${wsTriedTargets.map(t => `${t.host}:${t.port}`).join(', ')}`);
  scheduleReconnect();
}

function send(data) {
  if (state.ws && state.ws.readyState === 1) {
    state.ws.send(JSON.stringify(data));
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MESSAGE HANDLER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function handle(msg) {
  switch(msg.typ) {

    case 'init':
      updateState(msg.state);
      break;

    case 'state':
      updateState(msg.state);
      break;

    case 'tasks':
      msg.tasks.forEach(t => { state.tasks[t.id] = t; });
      renderTasks();
      break;

    case 'task_update':
      const t = msg.task;
      const isNew = !state.tasks[t.id];
      state.tasks[t.id] = t;
      updateTaskRow(t, isNew);
      updateBadge('tab-running', Object.values(state.tasks)
        .filter(x => ['running','evaluating','followup','queued'].includes(x.status)).length);
      break;

    case 'audit':
      msg.entries.forEach(addLogEntry);
      break;

    case 'audit_event':
      addLogEntry(msg.entry);
      break;

    case 'chat_response':
      removeTyping();
      addChatMsg('isaac', msg.text, msg.ts || now());
      break;

    case 'providers':
      renderProviders(msg.providers);
      break;

    case 'directives':
      renderDirectives(msg.directives);
      break;

    case 'system':
      state.paused = msg.event === 'paused';
      updatePauseBtn();
      addSysMsg(msg.event === 'paused' ? '⏸ Isaac pausiert.' : '▶ Isaac fortgesetzt.');
      break;

    case 'ok':
      addSysMsg(msg.msg);
      break;

    case 'fehler':
      addSysMsg('⚠ ' + msg.msg);
      break;
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATE UPDATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function updateState(s) {
  if (!s) return;

  if (s.executor) {
    setText('m-total',   s.executor.total);
    setText('m-running', s.executor.running);
    setText('m-queue',   s.executor.queue);
    const avg = s.executor.avg_score;
    setTextColored('m-avgscore', avg ? avg.toFixed(1) : '–',
                   avg >= 7 ? 'g' : avg >= 5 ? 'y' : 'r');
  }

  if (s.logic) {
    setText('l-evaluated', s.logic.total_evaluated);
    setText('l-followups', s.logic.followups_generated);
    setText('l-switches',  s.logic.switches);
    setText('l-decomps',   s.logic.decompositions);
    if (s.logic.cfg) setText('l-minscore', s.logic.cfg.min_score);
  }

  if (s.memory) {
    setText('mem-conv',    s.memory.conversations);
    setText('mem-facts',   s.memory.facts);
    setText('mem-tasks',   s.memory.task_results);
    setText('mem-working', s.memory.working_memory);
  }

  if (s.audit) {
    setText('a-total', s.audit.total_buffer);
    setText('a-size',  s.audit.audit_file_kb + ' KB');
  }

  if (s.providers) renderProviders(s.providers);
  if (s.tools) { state.tools = s.tools; renderToolsLive(); updateBadge('tab-tools', s.tools.length); }
  if (s.directives) {
    renderDirectives(s.directives);
    updateBadge('tab-dir', s.directives.length);
  }

  if (s.paused !== undefined) {
    state.paused = s.paused;
    updatePauseBtn();
  }

  // Running tasks sofort aktualisieren
  if (s.running) {
    s.running.forEach(t => {
      state.tasks[t.id] = t;
      updateTaskRow(t, false);
    });
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TASK MANAGER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const STATUS_COLORS = {
  running:    '#ffd166',
  evaluating: '#bd93f9',
  followup:   '#ff9500',
  done:       '#00e5a0',
  failed:     '#ff4060',
  queued:     '#3a3a5a',
  cancelled:  '#404060',
};

const TYPE_ICONS = {
  chat: '💬', search: '🔍', code: '⌨',
  translate: '🌐', analysis: '📊', plan: '🗺',
  file: '📁', aggregate: '⚡'
};

function renderTasks() {
  const container = document.getElementById('tm-container');
  const tasks = Object.values(state.tasks)
    .filter(t => state.filter === 'all' || t.status === state.filter)
    .sort((a, b) => b.erstellt.localeCompare(a.erstellt))
    .slice(0, 200);

  setText('tm-count', tasks.length + ' Tasks');
  container.innerHTML = '';
  tasks.forEach(t => {
    const el = buildTaskRow(t);
    container.appendChild(el);
  });
}

function updateTaskRow(task, isNew) {
  const existing = document.getElementById('task-' + task.id);
  const shouldShow = state.filter === 'all' || task.status === state.filter;

  if (existing) {
    if (!shouldShow) { existing.remove(); return; }
    // Nur Status/Progress/Score aktualisieren
    existing.className = 'task-row ' + task.status +
                         (existing.classList.contains('expanded') ? ' expanded' : '');
    if (isNew) existing.classList.add('flash-new');

    const fill = existing.querySelector('.task-progress-fill');
    if (fill) {
      fill.style.width = (task.progress * 100) + '%';
      fill.style.background = STATUS_COLORS[task.status] || '#3a3a5a';
    }
    const scoreEl = existing.querySelector('.task-score');
    if (scoreEl && task.score !== null) {
      scoreEl.textContent = task.score?.toFixed(1) ?? '–';
      scoreEl.style.color = task.score >= 7 ? 'var(--green)' :
                            task.score >= 5 ? 'var(--yellow)' : 'var(--red)';
    }
    const iterEl = existing.querySelector('.task-iter');
    if (iterEl) iterEl.textContent = `#${task.iteration}`;

    // Log aktualisieren
    const logEl = existing.querySelector('.task-log');
    if (logEl && task.log) {
      logEl.innerHTML = task.log.map(e =>
        `<div class="task-log-entry"><span class="tl-ts">${e.ts}</span>${e.msg}</div>`
      ).join('');
      logEl.scrollTop = logEl.scrollHeight;
    }
  } else if (shouldShow) {
    const el = buildTaskRow(task);
    if (isNew) el.classList.add('flash-new');
    const container = document.getElementById('tm-container');
    container.prepend(el);
  }
}

function buildTaskRow(task) {
  const row = document.createElement('div');
  row.className = 'task-row ' + task.status;
  row.id = 'task-' + task.id;

  const icon  = TYPE_ICONS[task.typ] || '◈';
  const color = STATUS_COLORS[task.status] || '#3a3a5a';
  const score = task.score !== null ? task.score?.toFixed(1) : '–';
  const scoreColor = task.score >= 7 ? 'var(--green)' :
                     task.score >= 5 ? 'var(--yellow)' : 'var(--red)';

  row.innerHTML = `
    <div class="task-header" onclick="toggleTask('${task.id}')">
      <span class="task-id">${task.id}</span>
      <span class="task-type">${icon} ${task.typ}</span>
      <span class="task-desc" title="${task.beschreibung}">${task.beschreibung}</span>
      <span class="task-prov">${task.provider}</span>
      <span class="task-iter">#${task.iteration}</span>
      <span class="task-score" style="color:${scoreColor}">${score}</span>
      <span class="task-dur">${task.dauer}s</span>
    </div>
    <div class="task-progress">
      <div class="task-progress-fill" style="width:${task.progress*100}%;background:${color}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="task-detail">
      <div class="detail-grid">
        ${buildScoreBars(task)}
        <div class="detail-block">
          <div class="detail-label">Antwort (Vorschau)</div>
          <div class="detail-value">${task.antwort_kurz || task.fehler || '–'}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-block">
          <div class="detail-label">Sub-Tasks / Modus</div>
          <div class="detail-value">${task.sub_tasks} Sub-Tasks | Followup: ${task.followup_mode || '–'}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-block full">
          <div class="detail-label">Live-Log</div>
          <div class="task-log">${(task.log || []).map(e =>
            `<div class="task-log-entry"><span class="tl-ts">${e.ts}</span>${e.msg}</div>`
          ).join('')}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:.4rem">
        <button class="task-cancel-btn"
          onclick="cancelTask('${task.id}')">✕ Abbrechen</button>
        <span style="color:var(--text2);font-size:.62rem;margin-left:.5rem">
          Erstellt: ${task.erstellt}
          ${task.parent_id ? `│ Parent: ${task.parent_id}` : ''}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  return row;
}

function buildScoreBars(task) {
  if (!task.score_detail) return `
    <div class="detail-block">
      <div class="detail-label">Score</div>
      <div class="detail-value">–</div>
    </div>`;

  const s = task.score_detail;
  const dims = [
    ['Gesamt',     s.total,       '#00cfff'],
    ['Länge',      s.length,      '#00e5a0'],
    ['Abdeckung',  s.coverage,    '#bd93f9'],
    ['Spezifität', s.specificity, '#ffd166'],
    ['Kohärenz',   s.coherence,   '#ff9500'],
  ];
  const bars = dims.map(([lbl, val, col]) => `
    <div class="score-bar-row">
      <span class="score-bar-lbl">${lbl}</span>
      <div class="score-bar-bg">
        <div class="score-bar-fill" style="width:${val*10}%;background:${col}"></div>
      </div>
      <span class="score-bar-val">${val?.toFixed(1)}</span>
    </div>`).join('');

  return `<div class="detail-block">
    <div class="detail-label">Quality Score (${task.score_detail.word_count} Wörter)</div>
    <div class="score-bars">${bars}</div>
    ${s.issues?.length ? `<div style="color:var(--red);font-size:.62rem;margin-top:.3rem">
      ⚠ ${s.issues.join(' │ ')}</div>` : ''}
  </div>`;
}

function toggleTask(id) {
  const row = document.getElementById('task-' + id);
  if (row) row.classList.toggle('expanded');
}

function cancelTask(id) {
  send({typ: 'task_cancel', task_id: id});
}

// Filter
function setFilter(f, btn) {
  state.filter = f;
  document.querySelectorAll('.tm-filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  renderTasks();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// AUDIT LOG
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let logCount = 0;

function addLogEntry(e) {
  if (!e) return;
  state.logs.push(e);
  if (state.logs.length > 1000) state.logs = state.logs.slice(-1000);
  logCount++;
  setText('log-count-label', logCount + ' Einträge');

  if (state.lfilter !== 'all' && e.typ !== state.lfilter) return;

  const container = document.getElementById('log-container');
  const row = document.createElement('div');
  row.className = 'log-entry ' + (e.typ || '');

  const caller = e.caller || e.task_id || '';
  const msg = buildLogMsg(e);

  row.innerHTML = `
    <span class="log-ts">${e.ts?.slice(11,19) || '--:--:--'}</span>
    <span class="log-typ">${e.typ || '?'}</span>
    <span class="log-caller">${caller}</span>
    <span class="log-msg">${msg}</span>
  `;
  container.appendChild(row);
  if (container.scrollTop + container.clientHeight > container.scrollHeight - 60) {
    container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
  }
}

function buildLogMsg(e) {
  switch(e.typ) {
    case 'task':     return `[${e.task_id}] ${e.status} – ${e.detail || ''}`;
    case 'quality':  return `[${e.task_id}] Score: ${e.score?.toFixed(1)} │ ${e.action_taken} │ iter=${e.iteration}`;
    case 'action':   return `${e.aktion}: ${e.detail || ''}`;
    case 'error':    return `${e.fehler} ${e.detail || ''}`;
    case 'steffen_input': return `"${e.text?.slice(0,100)}"`;
    case 'isaac_output':  return `"${e.text?.slice(0,100)}"`;
    case 'privilege': return `${e.aktion} → ${e.erlaubt ? '✓' : '✗'} (${e.grund || ''})`;
    case 'memory':   return `${e.op}: ${e.typ2 || e.typ} → ${e.key}`;
    default:         return JSON.stringify(e).slice(0, 150);
  }
}

function setLogFilter(f, btn) {
  state.lfilter = f;
  document.querySelectorAll('.tm-filter-btn[data-lfilter]').forEach(b =>
    b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  const container = document.getElementById('log-container');
  container.innerHTML = '';
  const filtered = f === 'all' ? state.logs :
                   state.logs.filter(e => e.typ === f);
  filtered.slice(-300).forEach(addLogEntry);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PROVIDER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderProviders(providers) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('providers-grid');
  if (!providers || !grid) return;
  grid.innerHTML = '';
  providers.forEach(p => {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'prov-card' +
      (p.primary ? ' primary' : '') +
      (!p.available ? ' unavail' : '');
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="prov-name">
        ${p.available ? '✓' : '✗'} ${p.name}
        ${p.primary ? '<span class="badge inf">PRIMÄR</span>' : ''}
      </div>
      <div class="prov-model">${p.model || '–'}</div>
      <div class="prov-rate">${p.rate || '–'}</div>
    `;
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DIREKTIVEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderDirectives(directives) {
  const rows = document.getElementById('dir-rows');
  const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar-directives');
  if (!rows) return;

  updateBadge('tab-dir', directives.length);

  if (!directives.length) {
    rows.innerHTML = '<em style="color:var(--text2)">Keine aktiven Direktiven</em>';
    sidebar.innerHTML = '<em>Keine</em>';
    return;
  }

  rows.innerHTML = directives.map(d => `
    <div class="directive-row">
      <span class="dir-priority">[${d.priority}]</span>
      <span class="dir-text">${d.text}</span>
      <span class="dir-id">${d.id}</span>
      <button class="dir-revoke" onclick="revokeDirective('${d.id}')">✕</button>
    </div>
  `).join('');

  sidebar.innerHTML = directives.slice(0, 4).map(d =>
    `<div style="padding:.1rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
      <span style="color:var(--yellow)">[${d.priority}]</span> ${d.text.slice(0, 45)}
    </div>`
  ).join('');
}

function addDirective() {
  const input = document.getElementById('dir-input');
  const text = input.value.trim();
  if (!text) return;
  send({typ: 'directive_add', text, priority: 10});
  input.value = '';
}

function revokeDirective(id) {
  send({typ: 'directive_revoke', id});
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TOOLS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function fetchJson(url, opts={}) {
  const res = await fetch(url, { cache: 'no-store', ...opts });
  const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || ('HTTP ' + res.status));
  return data;
}

async function refreshTools() {
  try {
    const [live, catalog] = await Promise.all([
      fetchJson('/api/tools/live'),
      fetchJson('/api/tools/catalog'),
    ]);
    state.liveTools = live.live;
    state.toolCatalog = catalog.items || [];
    state.tools = (live.live && live.live.registry_tools) || state.tools || [];
    renderToolsLive();
    renderToolCatalog();
    updateBadge('tab-tools', state.tools.length || 0);
    setText('tools-live-count', state.tools.length || 0);
  } catch (err) {
    const liveBox = document.getElementById('tools-live-list');
    if (liveBox) liveBox.innerHTML = `<div class="tool-mini">⚠ ${escHtml(err.message || String(err))}</div>`;
  }
}

function renderToolsLive() {
  const liveBox = document.getElementById('tools-live-list');
  if (!liveBox) return;
  const registry = state.tools || [];
  const live = state.liveTools || {};
  const httpEndpoints = (live.http_endpoints || []).map(ep => `<div class="tool-mini"><strong>${ep.method}</strong> <code>${ep.path}</code></div>`).join('');
  const regItems = registry.length ? registry.map(t => `
    <div class="tool-mini">
      <strong>${escHtml(t.name)}</strong>
      <div class="tool-meta">
        <span>${escHtml(t.kind)}</span><span>${escHtml(t.category || 'general')}</span><span>${t.active ? 'aktiv' : 'inaktiv'}</span><span>Trust ${t.trust}</span>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('') : '<div class="tool-mini">Keine Live-Tools registriert.</div>';
  const mcpCaps = (((live.mcp || {}).capabilities) || {});
  const mcpBox = `<div class="tool-mini"><strong>MCP-like</strong><div class="tool-meta"><span>Tools ${mcpCaps.tool_count || 0}</span><span>Resources ${mcpCaps.resource_count || 0}</span></div></div>`;
  liveBox.innerHTML = regItems + mcpBox + httpEndpoints;
}

function renderToolCatalog() {
  const localBox = document.getElementById('tools-local-list');
  const installBox = document.getElementById('tools-install-list');
  if (!localBox || !installBox) return;
  const items = state.toolCatalog || [];
  if (!items.length) {
    localBox.innerHTML = '<div class="tool-mini">Kein lokaler Katalog vorhanden.</div>';
    installBox.innerHTML = '';
    return;
  }
  localBox.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
    <div class="tool-mini">
      <strong>${escHtml(item.name)}</strong>
      <div class="tool-meta"><span>${escHtml(item.kind)}</span><span>${escHtml(item.category || 'general')}</span><span>ca. ${item.size_mb ?? 0} MB</span><span>${item.installed ? 'installiert' : 'bereit'}</span></div>
      <div>${escHtml(item.description || '')}</div>
    </div>`).join('');
  installBox.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
    <div class="tool-card">
      <strong>${escHtml(item.name)}</strong>
      <div class="tool-meta"><span>${escHtml(item.kind)}</span><span>${escHtml(item.category || 'general')}</span><span>ca. ${item.size_mb ?? 0} MB</span></div>
      <div>${escHtml(item.description || '')}</div>
      <div class="tool-actions">
        <button class="hbtn" ${item.installed ? 'disabled' : ''} onclick="installLocalTool('${item.catalog_id}')">${item.installed ? 'Installiert' : 'Local installieren'}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

async function installLocalTool(catalogId) {
  try {
    await fetchJson('/api/tools/install_local', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ catalog_id: catalogId })
    });
    addSysMsg('Tool lokal installiert: ' + catalogId);
    await refreshTools();
  } catch (err) {
    addSysMsg('⚠ Tool-Installation fehlgeschlagen: ' + (err.message || err));
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UPDATER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function refreshUpdater() {
  try {
    const [packages, st] = await Promise.all([
      fetchJson('/api/update/packages'),
      fetchJson('/api/update/status'),
    ]);
    state.updater.packages = packages.packages || [];
    state.updater.status = st || {};
    renderUpdater();
  } catch (err) {
    const box = document.getElementById('updater-status');
    if (box) box.innerHTML = `<div class="tool-mini">⚠ ${escHtml(err.message || String(err))}</div>`;
  }
}

function renderUpdater() {
  const listBox = document.getElementById('updater-package-list');
  const statusBox = document.getElementById('updater-status');
  const inspectBox = document.getElementById('updater-inspect');
  if (!listBox || !statusBox || !inspectBox) return;
  const packages = state.updater.packages || [];
  updateBadge('tab-updater', packages.length || '⇪');
  setText('updater-package-count', packages.length || 0);
  if (!packages.length) {
    listBox.innerHTML = '<div class="tool-mini">Kein ZIP-Paket im Download-Ordner gefunden.</div>';
  } else {
    listBox.innerHTML = packages.map(pkg => `
      <div class="tool-mini">
        <strong>${escHtml(pkg.name)}</strong>
        <div class="tool-meta"><span>${pkg.size_mb} MB</span><span>${escHtml(pkg.modified || '')}</span></div>
        <div class="tool-actions">
          <button class="hbtn" onclick="inspectUpdaterPackage('${pkg.name}')">Prüfen</button>
          <button class="hbtn" onclick="applyUpdaterPackage('${pkg.name}')">Patchen</button>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');
  }
  const st = state.updater.status || {};
  const lastApply = st.last_apply ? `<div class="tool-mini"><strong>Letztes Update</strong><div>${escHtml((st.last_apply.package || ''))}</div><div class="tool-meta"><span>${escHtml(st.last_apply.ts || '')}</span><span>${st.last_apply.ok ? 'ok' : 'fehler'}</span></div></div>` : '';
  const lastBackup = st.last_backup ? `<div class="tool-mini"><strong>Letztes Backup</strong><div><code>${escHtml(st.last_backup)}</code></div></div>` : '<div class="tool-mini">Noch kein Backup registriert.</div>';
  statusBox.innerHTML = lastApply + lastBackup;
  const insp = state.updater.inspect;
  if (!insp) {
    inspectBox.innerHTML = '<div class="tool-mini">Wähle ein Paket und klicke auf Prüfen.</div>';
  } else {
    inspectBox.innerHTML = `
      <div class="tool-mini"><strong>Prüfung: ${escHtml(insp.package || '')}</strong><div class="tool-meta"><span>Root ${escHtml(insp.root_mode || '.')}</span><span>Dateien ${insp.file_count || 0}</span><span>Python ${insp.python_files || 0}</span></div></div>
      <div class="tool-mini"><strong>Key Files</strong><div>${(insp.key_files || []).map(x => `<code>${escHtml(x)}</code>`).join('<br>') || '–'}</div></div>
      <div class="tool-mini"><strong>Hinweise</strong><div>${(insp.notes || []).slice(0,10).map(x => escHtml(x)).join('<br>') || 'Keine'}</div></div>`;
  }
}

async function inspectUpdaterPackage(name) {
  try {
    state.updater.selected = name;
    state.updater.inspect = await fetchJson('/api/update/inspect', {
      method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ package: name })
    });
    renderUpdater();
    addSysMsg('Paket geprüft: ' + name);
  } catch (err) {
    addSysMsg('⚠ Paketprüfung fehlgeschlagen: ' + (err.message || err));
  }
}

async function applyUpdaterPackage(name) {
  const ok = confirm('Patch jetzt anwenden? Isaac erstellt zuerst ein Backup und startet sich danach neu.');
  if (!ok) return;
  try {
    const res = await fetchJson('/api/update/apply', {
      method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ package: name, restart_after: true })
    });
    addSysMsg('Patch angewendet: ' + name + (res.restart_scheduled ? ' · Neustart geplant' : ''));
    await refreshUpdater();
  } catch (err) {
    addSysMsg('⚠ Patch fehlgeschlagen: ' + (err.message || err));
  }
}

async function rollbackUpdater() {
  const ok = confirm('Letztes Backup zurückspielen und Isaac neu starten?');
  if (!ok) return;
  try {
    const res = await fetchJson('/api/update/rollback', {
      method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ restart_after: true })
    });
    addSysMsg('Rollback ausgeführt' + (res.restart_scheduled ? ' · Neustart geplant' : ''));
    await refreshUpdater();
  } catch (err) {
    addSysMsg('⚠ Rollback fehlgeschlagen: ' + (err.message || err));
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CHAT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function sendChat() {
  const inp = document.getElementById('chat-input');
  const text = inp.value.trim();
  if (!text || !state.online) return;
  addChatMsg('steffen', text, now());
  send({typ: 'chat', text});
  inp.value = '';
  // Typing indicator
  addTyping();
}

function addChatMsg(who, text, ts) {
  const el = document.createElement('div');
  el.className = 'msg ' + who;
  const label = who === 'steffen' ? '▶ ' + CONFIG.owner : '⚡ Isaac';
  el.innerHTML = `<div class="who">${label}<span class="ts">${ts}</span></div><div>${escHtml(text)}</div>`;
  const container = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
  container.appendChild(el);
  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
}

function addSysMsg(text) {
  const el = document.createElement('div');
  el.className = 'msg system';
  el.textContent = text;
  const container = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
  container.appendChild(el);
  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;
}

let typingEl = null;
function addTyping() {
  removeTyping();
  typingEl = document.createElement('div');
  typingEl.className = 'msg isaac';
  typingEl.id = 'typing-indicator';
  typingEl.innerHTML = `<div class="who">⚡ Isaac</div>
    <span class="typing-dots"><span>●</span><span>●</span><span>●</span></span>`;
  const c = document.getElementById('chat-messages');
  c.appendChild(typingEl);
  c.scrollTop = c.scrollHeight;
}
function removeTyping() {
  if (typingEl) { typingEl.remove(); typingEl = null; }
}

function sendCommand(cmd) {
  const inp = document.getElementById('chat-input');
  inp.value = cmd;
  sendChat();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UI UTILS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const CONFIG = { owner: 'Steffen' };

function showTab(name) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach((t, i) => {
    const names = ['taskmanager', 'log', 'providers', 'directives', 'tools', 'updater'];
    t.classList.toggle('active', names[i] === name);
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(c => {
    c.classList.toggle('active', c.id === 'tab-' + name);
  });
}

function setOnline(online) {
  state.online = online;
  const dot = document.getElementById('conn-dot');
  const lbl = document.getElementById('conn-label');
  const inp = document.getElementById('chat-input');
  const btn = document.getElementById('chat-send-btn');
  const status = document.getElementById('chat-status');

  dot.className = 'dot ' + (online ? 'on' : 'boot');
  lbl.textContent = online ? 'Isaac online' : 'Verbinde...';
  inp.disabled = !online;
  btn.disabled = !online;
  status.textContent = online ? 'online' : 'offline';
  status.style.color = online ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--dim)';
}

function togglePause() {
  send({typ: state.paused ? 'resume' : 'pause'});
}

function updatePauseBtn() {
  const btn = document.getElementById('pause-btn');
  const sys = document.getElementById('sys-status');
  if (state.paused) {
    btn.textContent = '▶ Resume';
    btn.classList.remove('danger');
    sys.textContent = 'PAUSIERT';
    sys.className = 'badge hot';
  } else {
    btn.textContent = 'Pause';
    btn.classList.add('danger');
    sys.textContent = 'ONLINE';
    sys.className = 'badge on';
  }
}

function setText(id, val) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (el) el.textContent = val ?? '–';
}

function setTextColored(id, val, cls) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (el) {
    el.textContent = val ?? '–';
    el.className = 'mv ' + cls;
  }
}

function updateBadge(id, val) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (el) el.textContent = val;
}

function escHtml(s) {
  return String(s)
    .replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<')
    .replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
}

function now() {
  return new Date().toTimeString().slice(0,8);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
setInterval(() => {
  document.getElementById('clock').textContent = now();
}, 1000);

// Keyboard shortcuts
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === 'Enter') {
    sendChat();
  }
});

// Enter in Direktiven-Input
document.getElementById('dir-input')?.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') addDirective();
});

// WebSocket verbinden
connect();
refreshTools();
setInterval(refreshTools, 15000);



// UI bridge for redesigned control toggle
(function(){
  const orch = document.getElementById('orchestrator-toggle');
  if (orch) {
    orch.addEventListener('change', () => togglePause());
  }
  const oldUpdatePauseBtn = updatePauseBtn;
  updatePauseBtn = function(){
    oldUpdatePauseBtn();
    if (orch) orch.checked = !state.paused;
  };
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

from __future__ import annotations
from flask import Blueprint, jsonify, request
from tool_registry import get_tool_registry
from secrets_store import get_secrets_store
from tool_runtime import select_tool_for_prompt

dashboard_api = Blueprint("dashboard_api", __name__, url_prefix="/api")
registry = get_tool_registry()
secrets = get_secrets_store()

@dashboard_api.get("/tools")
def list_tools():
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "tools": registry.list_tools()})

@dashboard_api.post("/tools/add")
def add_tool():
    data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    api_key = (data.pop("api_key", "") or "").strip()
    if not data.get("name") or not data.get("kind"):
        return jsonify({"ok": False, "error": "name und kind sind Pflicht"}), 400
    tool = registry.add(data)
    if api_key:
        ref = f"{tool.tool_id}_secret"
        secrets.set_secret(ref, api_key)
        registry.update(tool.tool_id, {"secret_ref": ref})
    row = next(x for x in registry.list_tools() if x["tool_id"] == tool.tool_id)
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "tool": row})

@dashboard_api.post("/tools/update")
def update_tool():
    data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    tool_id = (data.get("tool_id") or "").strip()
    if not tool_id:
        return jsonify({"ok": False, "error": "tool_id fehlt"}), 400
    api_key = (data.pop("api_key", "") or "").strip()
    patch = {k: v for k, v in data.items() if k != "tool_id"}
    tool = registry.update(tool_id, patch)
    if api_key:
        ref = tool.secret_ref or f"{tool.tool_id}_secret"
        secrets.set_secret(ref, api_key)
        registry.update(tool.tool_id, {"secret_ref": ref})
    row = next(x for x in registry.list_tools() if x["tool_id"] == tool.tool_id)
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "tool": row})

@dashboard_api.post("/tools/delete")
def delete_tool():
    data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    return jsonify({"ok": registry.delete((data.get("tool_id") or "").strip())})

@dashboard_api.post("/tools/toggle")
def toggle_tool():
    data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    tool = registry.update((data.get("tool_id") or "").strip(), {"active": bool(data.get("active", True))})
    row = next(x for x in registry.list_tools() if x["tool_id"] == tool.tool_id)
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "tool": row})

@dashboard_api.post("/tools/suggest")
def suggest_tool():
    data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
    prompt = (data.get("prompt") or "").strip()
    tool = select_tool_for_prompt(prompt)
    if not tool:
        return jsonify({"ok": False, "error": "Kein passendes Tool"}), 404
    row = next(x for x in registry.list_tools() if x["tool_id"] == tool.tool_id)
    return jsonify({"ok": True, "tool": row})

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Isaac Dashboard – Tools & APIs</title>
  <style>
    :root { --bg:#0f1115; --panel:#171a21; --muted:#8d96a8; --text:#edf1f7; --line:#2a3040; --accent:#67a3ff; --good:#39c46a; --bad:#ff6b6b; --warn:#ffb347; }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { margin:0; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text); font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif; }
    header { position:sticky; top:0; z-index:10; background:rgba(15,17,21,.95); backdrop-filter:blur(10px); border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); padding:14px; }
    h1 { font-size:20px; margin:0 0 8px; }
    .sub { color:var(--muted); font-size:13px; }
    .wrap { padding:14px; max-width:920px; margin:0 auto; }
    .grid { display:grid; gap:12px; }
    .card { background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:16px; padding:14px; box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.18); }
    .toolbar { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:10px; }
    button { background:#212736; color:var(--text); border:1px solid #35405a; border-radius:12px; padding:10px 12px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; }
    button.primary { background:var(--accent); color:#08111f; border-color:transparent; }
    button.danger { background:#3a1f26; color:#ffd6d6; border-color:#5f2d37; }
    input, select, textarea { width:100%; background:#10141d; color:var(--text); border:1px solid #31384a; border-radius:12px; padding:10px 12px; font:inherit; }
    textarea { min-height:92px; resize:vertical; }
    label { display:grid; gap:6px; font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); }
    .two { display:grid; gap:10px; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .three { display:grid; gap:10px; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; }
    .list { display:grid; gap:12px; margin-top:14px; }
    .tool { border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:14px; padding:12px; background:#141923; }
    .row { display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
    .name { font-size:16px; font-weight:700; }
    .meta { color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; margin-top:6px; }
    .pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; border-radius:999px; padding:6px 10px; font-size:12px; border:1px solid var(--line); background:#0f131c; }
    .ok { color:var(--good); } .bad { color:var(--bad); } .warn { color:var(--warn); }
    .hidden { display:none; }
    pre { white-space:pre-wrap; word-break:break-word; background:#0d1016; border:1px solid var(--line); padding:12px; border-radius:12px; color:#c9d3e5; max-height:240px; overflow:auto; }
    @media (max-width:680px) { .two, .three { grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <header><div class="wrap" style="padding:0;"><h1>Isaac – Tools & APIs</h1><div class="sub">Neues Tool hinzufügen, API-Key speichern, Testlauf ausführen, Priorität verwalten.</div></div></header>
  <div class="wrap grid">
    <section class="card">
      <div class="row"><div><div class="name">Add-Flow</div><div class="sub">Geführter Wizard für API, Suchmaschine, Web-Tool oder Skript.</div></div><button class="primary" onclick="resetForm()">Neu</button></div>
      <div class="grid" style="margin-top:12px;">
        <div class="two">
          <label>Typ<select id="kind" onchange="onKindChange()"><option value="api">API</option><option value="search">Suchmaschine</option><option value="web_tool">Web-Tool</option><option value="script">Lokales Skript</option></select></label>
          <label>Name<input id="name" placeholder="z. B. OpenWeather oder GitHub Search" /></label>
        </div>
        <label>Beschreibung<textarea id="description" placeholder="Wofür soll das Tool genutzt werden?"></textarea></label>
        <div class="two">
          <label>Kategorie<input id="category" placeholder="z. B. wetter, suche, code, dateien" value="general" /></label>
          <label>Priorität<input id="priority" type="number" min="0" max="100" value="50" /></label>
        </div>
        <div class="two">
          <label id="urlLabel">Base URL / Website<input id="base_url" placeholder="https://example.com/api" /></label>
          <label id="endpointWrap">Endpoint / Testpfad<input id="endpoint" placeholder="/v1/status" /></label>
        </div>
        <div class="two hidden" id="scriptBlock">
          <label>Skriptpfad<input id="script_path" placeholder="/data/data/.../mein_script.sh" /></label>
          <label>Website-URL (optional)<input id="website_url" placeholder="https://..." /></label>
        </div>
        <div class="three">
          <label>Auth-Typ<select id="auth_type" onchange="onAuthChange()"><option value="none">Keine</option><option value="header">Header</option><option value="query">Query</option></select></label>
          <label>Auth-Feld<input id="auth_field" placeholder="Authorization / api_key" /></label>
          <label>Prefix<input id="auth_prefix" placeholder="Bearer " /></label>
        </div>
        <div class="two">
          <label>API-Key / Secret<input id="api_key" type="password" placeholder="optional" /></label>
          <label>Query-Parameter (für Suche)<input id="query_param" value="q" /></label>
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar"><button class="primary" onclick="saveTool()">Speichern</button><button onclick="refreshTools()">Aktualisieren</button></div>
      </div>
    </section>
    <section class="card">
      <div class="row"><div><div class="name">Registrierte Tools</div><div class="sub">Testen, deaktivieren, Priorität ändern oder löschen.</div></div></div>
      <div id="toolList" class="list"></div>
    </section>
    <section class="card">
      <div class="name">Testausgabe</div><div class="sub">Antworten aus Tool-Tests erscheinen hier.</div>
      <pre id="output">Bereit.</pre>
    </section>
  </div>
  <script>
    let currentEditId = null;
    function byId(id) { return document.getElementById(id); }
    function onKindChange() {
      const kind = byId('kind').value;
      byId('scriptBlock').classList.toggle('hidden', kind !== 'script');
      byId('endpointWrap').classList.toggle('hidden', kind === 'script');
      byId('urlLabel').innerText = (kind === 'search') ? 'Such-URL' : 'Base URL / Website';
    }
    function onAuthChange() {
      const disabled = byId('auth_type').value === 'none';
      byId('auth_field').disabled = disabled;
      byId('auth_prefix').disabled = disabled;
      byId('api_key').disabled = disabled;
    }
    function payloadFromForm() {
      return {
        tool_id: currentEditId || undefined,
        kind: byId('kind').value,
        name: byId('name').value.trim(),
        description: byId('description').value.trim(),
        category: byId('category').value.trim(),
        priority: Number(byId('priority').value || 50),
        base_url: byId('base_url').value.trim(),
        endpoint: byId('endpoint').value.trim(),
        script_path: byId('script_path').value.trim(),
        website_url: byId('website_url').value.trim(),
        auth_type: byId('auth_type').value,
        auth_field: byId('auth_field').value.trim(),
        auth_prefix: byId('auth_prefix').value,
        api_key: byId('api_key').value.trim(),
        query_param: byId('query_param').value.trim()
      };
    }
    function resetForm() {
      currentEditId = null;
      ['name','description','base_url','endpoint','script_path','website_url','auth_field','auth_prefix','api_key'].forEach(id => byId(id).value = '');
      byId('kind').value = 'api';
      byId('category').value = 'general';
      byId('priority').value = '50';
      byId('query_param').value = 'q';
      byId('auth_type').value = 'none';
      onKindChange(); onAuthChange();
    }
    async function saveTool() {
      const payload = payloadFromForm();
      const route = currentEditId ? '/api/tools/update' : '/api/tools/add';
      const res = await fetch(route, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(payload)});
      const data = await res.json();
      byId('output').textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
      if (data.ok) { resetForm(); refreshTools(); }
    }
    async function refreshTools() {
      const res = await fetch('/api/tools');
      const data = await res.json();
      const box = byId('toolList');
      box.innerHTML = '';
      for (const tool of data.tools || []) {
        const el = document.createElement('div');
        const statusClass = tool.last_status === 'ok' ? 'ok' : (tool.last_status === 'failed' ? 'bad' : 'warn');
        el.className = 'tool';
        el.innerHTML = `
          <div class="row">
            <div><div class="name">${escapeHtml(tool.name)}</div><div class="meta">${escapeHtml(tool.kind)} · ${escapeHtml(tool.category)} · ${tool.active ? 'aktiv' : 'deaktiviert'}</div></div>
            <div class="pill ${statusClass}">${tool.last_status || 'unknown'}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="meta" style="margin-top:8px;">Priorität: ${tool.priority} · Vertrauen: ${tool.trust} · Erfolg: ${tool.success_rate}%</div>
          <div class="toolbar">
            <button onclick="editTool('${tool.tool_id}')">Bearbeiten</button>
            <button onclick="testTool('${tool.tool_id}')">Testen</button>
            <button onclick="toggleTool('${tool.tool_id}', ${!tool.active})">${tool.active ? 'Deaktivieren' : 'Aktivieren'}</button>
            <button class="danger" onclick="deleteTool('${tool.tool_id}')">Löschen</button>
          </div>`;
        box.appendChild(el);
      }
    }
    async function editTool(toolId) {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/tools/${toolId}`);
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!data.ok) return;
      const t = data.tool;
      currentEditId = t.tool_id;
      byId('kind').value = t.kind || 'api';
      byId('name').value = t.name || '';
      byId('description').value = t.description || '';
      byId('category').value = t.category || 'general';
      byId('priority').value = t.priority ?? 50;
      byId('base_url').value = t.base_url || '';
      byId('endpoint').value = t.endpoint || '';
      byId('script_path').value = t.script_path || '';
      byId('website_url').value = t.website_url || '';
      byId('auth_type').value = t.auth_type || 'none';
      byId('auth_field').value = t.auth_field || '';
      byId('auth_prefix').value = t.auth_prefix || '';
      byId('query_param').value = t.query_param || 'q';
      byId('api_key').value = '';
      onKindChange(); onAuthChange();
    }
    async function testTool(toolId) {
      const res = await fetch('/api/tools/test', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify({tool_id:toolId, test_query:'isaac test'})});
      const data = await res.json();
      byId('output').textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
      refreshTools();
    }
    async function toggleTool(toolId, active) {
      const res = await fetch('/api/tools/toggle', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify({tool_id:toolId, active})});
      const data = await res.json();
      byId('output').textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
      refreshTools();
    }
    async function deleteTool(toolId) {
      if (!confirm('Tool wirklich löschen?')) return;
      const res = await fetch('/api/tools/delete', {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify({tool_id:toolId})});
      const data = await res.json();
      byId('output').textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
      refreshTools();
    }
    function escapeHtml(str) {
      return String(str || '').replaceAll('&','&').replaceAll('<','<').replaceAll('>','>').replaceAll('"','"').replaceAll("'",''');
    }
    resetForm(); refreshTools();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
